titles.en: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Minhal Al-qaṣṣab
Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Minhal Al-qaṣṣab

segments: ه عن منهال القصّاب فقد رويته عن أبي- رضي اللّه عنه- عن محمّد بن يحيى العطّار، عن أحمد بن محمّد بن عيسى، عن الحسن بن محبوب، عن منهال القصّاب‌.
arabic.text: ه عن منهال القصّاب فقد رويته عن أبي- رضي اللّه عنه- عن محمّد بن يحيى العطّار، عن أحمد بن محمّد بن عيسى، عن الحسن بن محبوب، عن منهال القصّاب‌.

segments: And whatever is narrated from Minhal Al-Qaṣṣab, I have narrated it from my father - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Muhammad ibn Yahya Al-Aṭṭar, from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn ʿIsa, from Al-Hasan ibn Mahbub, from Minhal Al-Qaṣṣab.
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text: And whatever is narrated from Minhal Al-Qaṣṣab, I have narrated it from my father - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Muhammad ibn Yahya Al-Aṭṭar, from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn ʿIsa, from Al-Hasan ibn Mahbub, from Minhal Al-Qaṣṣab.
